title: San Francisco Chronicle mayor guide sample
text:
Sample Chronicle Mayor Guide
Sample voter guide: San Francisco mayor
Sample fixture notice: this page is representative test content only and is not an official 2026 endorsement.
The editorial board describes the mayoral contest as a choice about housing, transit reliability, public safety, and downtown recovery.
What voters should compare
Candidate A is described in this sample as emphasizing faster housing approvals and clear performance goals for city departments.
Candidate B is described in this sample as emphasizing neighborhood services, small-business support, and budget oversight.
The sample article asks readers to verify claims against official filings, candidate questionnaires, and public debate transcripts before making a decision.
